title: Senior Doctor - Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners:
Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners!
